title: Difference between these two
wikitext:
[]: Difference between these two?             Quote Post by Kye7 » Sun Oct 30, 2011 2:22 pm My last thread completely disappeared from the internet.. So I remade it. I didn't even get a message, I'm assuming it was just an error. Was browsing around on amazon to buy Platinum.. but I ran into two different versions.. Does anyone the know difference? http://www.amazon.com/Neon-Genesis-Evangelion-Platinum-Collection/dp/B000767QTA/ref=pd_cp_mov_0 http://www.amazon.com/Neon-Genesis-Evangelion-Platinum-Collection/dp/B0002KVVAG/ref=sr_1_14?ie=UTF8&qid=1319990151&sr=8-14 And these are the 'thin packs', right?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Oct 30, 2011 2:35 pm The first is the entire Platinum thinpack. The 2nd is the Platinum individual disc 2 (not thinpak). The first is being sold by Amazon, the 2nd is sold by "Movie Mountain".

[]:             Quote Post by Kye7 » Sun Oct 30, 2011 3:15 pm Ornette wrote: The first is the entire Platinum thinpack. The 2nd is the Platinum individual disc 2 (not thinpak). The first is being sold by Amazon, the 2nd is sold by "Movie Mountain".

[]:             Quote Post by svenge » Sun Oct 30, 2011 11:19 pm Kye7 wrote: Ah, I see now! So the second link is just PART of the platinum series?
